Enterprise HR System

This project contains 10 agents, 12 tools, 5 knowledge sources.

Project Details

Description

Comprehensive AI-powered HR automation platform covering the full employee lifecycle from recruitment through offboarding. Integrates with enterprise systems including Workday, ADP, Greenhouse, and Microsoft 365.

Business Justification

Reduce HR operational costs by 40% while improving employee experience scores. Automate routine HR tasks to allow HR professionals to focus on strategic initiatives and complex employee matters.

  • Target Completion: 2026-06-30
  • Estimated Effort: 16 weeks
  • Team Size: 8
  • Integration Points: Workday HRIS, ADP Payroll, Greenhouse ATS, Microsoft 365, SendGrid, Checkr, SurveyMonkey
  • Deployment Target: Hybrid
  • Overall Risk: Medium
  • Compliance: GDPR, SOC 2 Type II, EEOC, ADA, FMLA, FLSA, HIPAA (benefits data)
  • Data Classification: Confidential — contains PII and compensation data
  • Regulatory Constraints: Not provided

Critical Dependencies

Not provided

Key Assumptions

1. Existing Workday and ADP contracts include API access 2. IT security approves OAuth integration patterns 3. Legal reviews AI-assisted screening for bias compliance 4. Change management plan accompanies rollout

Open Questions / Blockers

1. Should AI screening decisions require human review before rejection? 2. What is the data retention policy for candidate information? 3. How should the system handle multi-country payroll in Phase 2? 4. What SLA is required for leave request processing?

Agents

Agent

HR Orchestrator

Medium

Central coordinator for all HR operations. Routes employee lifecycle events to specialized agents and maintains cross-functional awareness.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: HR Operations Director
  • Goal: Coordinate all HR functions across the employee lifecycle from recruitment through offboarding
  • Instructions: You are the central HR coordinator. Route incoming requests to the appropriate specialized agent based on request type. Maintain awareness of cross-functional dependencies (e.g., new hire triggers both onboarding and payroll setup). Escalate complex cases that span multiple domains.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 20
  • Delegation: Enabled
Agent

Recruitment Agent

Low

Manages the end-to-end hiring pipeline from job posting to offer acceptance.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: Talent Acquisition Specialist
  • Goal: Source, evaluate, and hire top talent efficiently while maintaining excellent candidate experience
  • Instructions: Manage the full recruitment lifecycle. Create job postings from approved requisitions, coordinate with the screening agent for resume evaluation, and hand off qualified candidates to the interview scheduler. Track pipeline metrics and time-to-hire.
  • Memory: Long-term
  • Max Iterations: 15
  • Delegation: Enabled
Agent

Onboarding Agent

Low

Guides new employees through the onboarding process from offer acceptance through the first 90 days.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: New Hire Onboarding Specialist
  • Goal: Ensure smooth onboarding experience with all systems, access, and training set up on day one
  • Instructions: Generate offer letters and employment contracts. Set up employee records in HRIS. Create IT access requests and equipment orders. Schedule orientation and training sessions. Send welcome packages and first-week agenda. Track 30/60/90 day onboarding milestones.
  • Memory: Long-term
  • Max Iterations: 12
  • Delegation: Disabled
Agent

Payroll Agent

High

Processes payroll including salary calculations, tax deductions, and benefits administration.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: Payroll Administrator
  • Goal: Process payroll accurately and on time with full tax compliance across all jurisdictions
  • Instructions: Calculate gross pay, deductions, and net pay for each pay period. Handle tax withholding for federal, state, and local jurisdictions. Process benefits deductions, 401(k) contributions, and garnishments. Generate pay stubs and year-end tax documents. Flag anomalies for human review.
  • Memory: Long-term
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Disabled
Agent

Leave Management Agent

Low

Processes leave requests, tracks PTO balances, and ensures coverage during absences.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: Leave Coordinator
  • Goal: Process leave requests fairly while maintaining operational coverage
  • Instructions: Process PTO, sick leave, parental leave, and FMLA requests. Check leave balances and policy compliance. Verify team coverage before approving. Notify managers and affected team members. Track accruals and carry-over limits. Escalate FMLA and ADA accommodation requests to HR specialists.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 8
  • Delegation: Disabled
Agent

Performance Review Agent

Medium

Facilitates performance reviews, goal tracking, and 360-degree feedback collection.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: Performance Analyst
  • Goal: Enable fair and comprehensive performance evaluations with actionable feedback
  • Instructions: Distribute and collect 360-degree feedback surveys. Aggregate peer, manager, and self-review data. Generate performance summary reports highlighting strengths and development areas. Track goal progress against OKRs. Flag calibration concerns when ratings diverge. Maintain confidentiality of individual feedback.
  • Memory: Long-term
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Disabled
Agent

Employee Relations Agent

High

Handles workplace issues, conflict resolution, and employee engagement initiatives.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: Employee Relations Specialist
  • Goal: Resolve workplace issues promptly while maintaining trust and confidentiality
  • Instructions: Receive and triage employee complaints and grievances. Research applicable company policies for each case. Document incidents with proper chain of custody. Recommend mediation or escalation based on severity. Track case resolution timelines. Maintain strict confidentiality. Generate anonymized trend reports.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 12
  • Delegation: Disabled
Agent

Compliance Agent

High

Ensures HR operations comply with labor laws, regulations, and company policies.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: HR Compliance Officer
  • Goal: Ensure full compliance with employment law and internal policies across all HR operations
  • Instructions: Monitor HR operations for regulatory compliance. Audit hiring practices for EEOC adherence. Verify I-9 and work authorization documentation. Review leave policies against FMLA and state requirements. Check payroll for wage and hour law compliance. Generate compliance reports and risk assessments. Alert leadership to emerging regulatory changes.
  • Memory: Long-term
  • Max Iterations: 15
  • Delegation: Disabled
Agent

Screening Agent

Medium

Evaluates resumes and applications against job requirements and runs background checks.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: Resume Analyst
  • Goal: Screen applications against job requirements with fairness and accuracy
  • Instructions: Evaluate each application against the job description requirements. Score candidates on skill match, experience relevance, and cultural indicators. Run background checks on shortlisted candidates. Flag any bias concerns for human review. Maintain EEOC compliance in all screening.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Disabled
Agent

Interview Scheduler

Low

Coordinates interview logistics including panel assembly, room booking, and candidate communication.

  • Framework: watsonx Orchestrate
  • Model: gpt-oss-120b
  • Role: Interview Coordinator
  • Goal: Schedule interviews efficiently while respecting all participants' availability
  • Instructions: Find optimal interview slots by checking interviewer and candidate availability. Send calendar invitations and preparation materials. Handle rescheduling requests. Ensure interview panels have diverse representation. Send reminder notifications 24 hours before each interview.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 8
  • Delegation: Disabled

Tools

Tool

ATS API

Applicant Tracking System for managing job postings, applications, and candidate pipelines.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: JSON — candidate data, job requisition ID
  • Outputs: JSON — application status, pipeline stage
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: https://ats.greenhouse.io/api/v2
  • Timeout: 30s
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Background Check API

Pre-employment background screening including criminal, education, and employment verification.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: JSON — candidate PII, check type
  • Outputs: JSON — report status, findings
  • Auth Method: API Key
  • Endpoint: https://api.checkr.com/v1
  • Timeout: 60s
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Calendar API

Microsoft Graph Calendar API for scheduling interviews and checking availability.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: JSON — event details, attendees, time range
  • Outputs: JSON — event confirmation, free/busy slots
  • Auth Method: OAuth
  • Endpoint: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/calendar
  • Timeout: 15s
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Document Generator

Generates templated HR documents including offer letters, contracts, and policy acknowledgements.

  • Type: Python
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: JSON — template name, variable values
  • Outputs: PDF / DOCX — rendered document
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: internal://docgen-service
  • Timeout: 30s
  • Error Handling: Fallback
Tool

Email & Notifications

SendGrid-based email and notification service for HR communications.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: JSON — recipient, template ID, variables
  • Outputs: JSON — delivery status, message ID
  • Auth Method: API Key
  • Endpoint: https://api.sendgrid.com/v3/mail/send
  • Timeout: 10s
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Payroll Processor

ADP Workforce Now API for payroll processing, tax calculations, and direct deposit.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: JSON — employee ID, pay period, adjustments
  • Outputs: JSON — payslip data, tax breakdown
  • Auth Method: OAuth
  • Endpoint: https://api.adp.com/hr/v2/workers
  • Timeout: 45s
  • Error Handling: Abort
Tool

HRIS API

Workday HRIS API for employee records, org structure, and HR data management.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: JSON / XML — employee queries, record updates
  • Outputs: JSON — employee records, org hierarchy
  • Auth Method: OAuth
  • Endpoint: https://wd5-services.workday.com/api/v1
  • Timeout: 30s
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Survey Tool

SurveyMonkey API for 360-degree feedback, engagement surveys, and pulse checks.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: JSON — survey template, recipient list
  • Outputs: JSON — response data, aggregated scores
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: https://api.surveymonkey.com/v3
  • Timeout: 20s
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Observability Service

Structured logging, distributed tracing, and alerting. Tracks latency, token usage, and error rates per agent step.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided
  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided
  • Timeout: Not provided
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Semantic Cache

Caches LLM responses by semantic similarity. Reduces latency and cost for repeated queries.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided
  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided
  • Timeout: Not provided
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Eval Framework

Golden dataset evaluation, regression testing, and A/B comparison for agent quality.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided
  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided
  • Timeout: Not provided
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Secrets Manager

Secure credential storage and rotation. API key management, audit logging for all access.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided
  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided
  • Timeout: Not provided
  • Error Handling: Retry

Knowledge Sources

Knowledge

Job Descriptions DB

Database of approved job descriptions, role requirements, and competency frameworks.

  • Risk: None
  • Data Formats: JSON (structured role definitions)
  • Size: ~2,500 active job descriptions
  • Location: PostgreSQL — hr_jobs schema
  • Access Method: SQL queries via connection pool
  • Sensitivity: Internal
  • Update Frequency: On change (event-driven)
  • Versioning: Database versioning with audit trail
Knowledge

Training Materials

Onboarding content, compliance training, and professional development courses.

  • Risk: None
  • Data Formats: HTML / PDF / SCORM
  • Size: ~450 courses, 12GB content
  • Location: SharePoint Learning Center
  • Access Method: Microsoft Graph API
  • Sensitivity: Internal
  • Update Frequency: Weekly sync
  • Versioning: SharePoint version history
Knowledge

Benefits Catalog

Employee benefits packages including health insurance, retirement plans, and perks.

  • Risk: None
  • Data Formats: JSON (plan definitions + eligibility rules)
  • Size: ~85 plan configurations
  • Location: Benefits Administration Platform
  • Access Method: REST API with OAuth
  • Sensitivity: Confidential
  • Update Frequency: Annual (open enrollment) + on change
  • Versioning: Plan year snapshots
Knowledge

Company Policies

Employee handbook, HR policies, and standard operating procedures.

  • Risk: None
  • Data Formats: Markdown / HTML
  • Size: ~120 policy documents
  • Location: Confluence Wiki — HR Policy Space
  • Access Method: Confluence REST API
  • Sensitivity: Internal
  • Update Frequency: On publish (webhook)
  • Versioning: Confluence page versioning
Knowledge

Labor Law Database

Employment law reference covering federal, state, and local regulations.

  • Risk: None
  • Data Formats: JSON (statutes + case summaries)
  • Size: 50 states + federal, ~15,000 statutes
  • Location: Westlaw Edge — Employment Law Module
  • Access Method: Westlaw API with subscription key
  • Sensitivity: Public
  • Update Frequency: Daily
  • Versioning: Statutory effective dates

Onboarding Agent [Notify]Email & Notifications [Input] Dashed

Leave Management Agent [Notify]Email & Notifications [Input] Dashed

HR Orchestrator [Performance]Performance Review Agent [Input]
HR Orchestrator [Relations]Employee Relations Agent [Input]
HR Orchestrator [Compliance]Compliance Agent [Input]

Performance Review Agent [HRIS]HRIS API [Input] Dashed

Compliance Agent [Policies]Company Policies [Input] Dotted

Annotations

Enterprise HR Agentic System
This architecture models a comprehensive HR automation platform with 10 specialized agents covering the full employee lifecycle: recruitment, screening, interviews, onboarding, payroll, leave management, performance reviews, employee relations, and compliance. Tip: Check File → Version History to see how this system was built across 4 phases: • Phase 1: Core Recruitment Pipeline • Phase 2: Interview & Onboarding • Phase 3: Payroll & Benefits • Phase 4: Performance, Relations & Compliance
Generated by Agentic Graph
